001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean;
018
019import static java.lang.annotation.ElementType.*;
020import static java.lang.annotation.RetentionPolicy.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.lang.annotation.*;
024import java.lang.reflect.*;
025
026/**
027 * Annotation for specifying bean-modeling config properties on REST classes and methods.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * The bean-modeling sibling of {@code @MarshalledConfig}.
031 * Where {@code @MarshalledConfig} (in <c>juneau-marshall</c>) carries the marshalling-only attributes
032 * (such as {@code dictionary}, {@code swaps}, {@code typePropertyName}, {@code locale}, {@code mediaType},
033 * and {@code timeZone}), this annotation carries the attributes that describe how the bean MODEL is
034 * detected and introspected — visibility settings, required-properties toggles, fluent-setter detection,
035 * property naming, not-bean exclusions, etc.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * Splitting the annotations lets a class/method participate in bean-modeling configuration without
039 * dragging in any marshalling concerns, and lets the bean-modeling layer live in <c>juneau-commons</c>
040 * independent of <c>juneau-marshall</c>.
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * Can be used in the following locations:
044 * <ul>
045 *    <li>Classes and methods (typically REST classes/methods).
046 * </ul>
047 */
048@Documented
049@Target({ TYPE, METHOD })
050@Retention(RUNTIME)
051@Inherited
052@SuppressWarnings({
053   "java:S100" // Annotation methods use underscore suffix to avoid Java keyword conflicts
054})
055public @interface BeanConfig {
056
057   /**
058    * Minimum bean class visibility.
059    *
060    * <p>
061    * Classes are not considered beans unless they meet the minimum visibility requirements.
062    *
063    * <p>
064    * For example, if the visibility is <c>PUBLIC</c> and the bean class is <jk>protected</jk>, then the class
065    * will not be interpreted as a bean class and be serialized as a string.
066    * <br>Use this setting to reduce the visibility requirement.
067    *
068    * <ul class='values'>
069    *    <li><js>"PUBLIC"</js> (default)
070    *    <li><js>"PROTECTED"</js>
071    *    <li><js>"DEFAULT"</js>
072    *    <li><js>"PRIVATE"</js>
073    * </ul>
074    *
075    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
076    *    <li class='note'>
077    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
078    * </ul>
079    *
080    * @return The annotation value.
081    */
082   String beanClassVisibility() default "";
083
084   /**
085    * Minimum bean constructor visibility.
086    *
087    * <p>
088    * Only look for constructors with the specified minimum visibility.
089    *
090    * <p>
091    * This setting affects the logic for finding no-arg constructors for bean.
092    * <br>Normally, only <jk>public</jk> no-arg constructors are used.
093    * <br>Use this setting if you want to reduce the visibility requirement.
094    *
095    * <ul class='values'>
096    *    <li><js>"PUBLIC"</js> (default)
097    *    <li><js>"PROTECTED"</js>
098    *    <li><js>"DEFAULT"</js>
099    *    <li><js>"PRIVATE"</js>
100    * </ul>
101    *
102    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
103    *    <li class='note'>
104    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
105    * </ul>
106    *
107    * @return The annotation value.
108    */
109   String beanConstructorVisibility() default "";
110
111   /**
112    * Minimum bean field visibility.
113    *
114    * <p>
115    * Only look for bean fields with the specified minimum visibility.
116    *
117    * <p>
118    * This affects which fields on a bean class are considered bean properties.
119    * <br>Normally only <jk>public</jk> fields are considered.
120    * <br>Use this setting if you want to reduce the visibility requirement.
121    *
122    * <ul class='values'>
123    *    <li><js>"PUBLIC"</js> (default)
124    *    <li><js>"PROTECTED"</js>
125    *    <li><js>"DEFAULT"</js>
126    *    <li><js>"PRIVATE"</js>
127    * </ul>
128    *
129    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
130    *    <li class='note'>
131    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
132    * </ul>
133    *
134    * @return The annotation value.
135    */
136   String beanFieldVisibility() default "";
137
138   /**
139    * BeanMap.put() returns old property value.
140    *
141    * <p>
142    * If <js>"true"</js>, then the {@code BeanMap.put()} method will return old property values.
143    * <br>Otherwise, it returns <jk>null</jk>.
144    *
145    * <ul class='values'>
146    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
147    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default because it introduces a slight performance penalty during serialization)
148    * </ul>
149    *
150    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
151    *    <li class='note'>
152    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
153    * </ul>
154    *
155    * @return The annotation value.
156    */
157   String beanMapPutReturnsOldValue() default "";
158
159   /**
160    * Minimum bean method visibility.
161    *
162    * <p>
163    * Only look for bean methods with the specified minimum visibility.
164    *
165    * <p>
166    * This affects which methods are detected as getters and setters on a bean class.
167    * <br>Normally only <jk>public</jk> getters and setters are considered.
168    * <br>Use this setting if you want to reduce the visibility requirement.
169    *
170    * <ul class='values'>
171    *    <li><js>"PUBLIC"</js> (default)
172    *    <li><js>"PROTECTED"</js>
173    *    <li><js>"DEFAULT"</js>
174    *    <li><js>"PRIVATE"</js>
175    * </ul>
176    *
177    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
178    *    <li class='note'>
179    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
180    * </ul>
181    *
182    * @return The annotation value.
183    */
184   String beanMethodVisibility() default "";
185
186   /**
187    * Beans require no-arg constructors.
188    *
189    * <p>
190    * If <js>"true"</js>, a Java class must implement a default no-arg constructor to be considered a bean.
191    * <br>Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
192    *
193    * <ul class='values'>
194    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
195    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
196    * </ul>
197    *
198    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
199    *    <li class='note'>
200    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
201    * </ul>
202    *
203    * @return The annotation value.
204    */
205   String beansRequireDefaultConstructor() default "";
206
207   /**
208    * Beans require Serializable interface.
209    *
210    * <p>
211    * If <js>"true"</js>, a Java class must implement the {@link Serializable} interface to be considered a bean.
212    * <br>Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
213    *
214    * <ul class='values'>
215    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
216    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
217    * </ul>
218    *
219    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
220    *    <li class='note'>
221    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
222    * </ul>
223    *
224    * @return The annotation value.
225    */
226   String beansRequireSerializable() default "";
227
228   /**
229    * Beans require setters for getters.
230    *
231    * <p>
232    * If <js>"true"</js>, only getters that have equivalent setters will be considered as properties on a bean.
233    * <br>Otherwise, they will be ignored.
234    *
235    * <ul class='values'>
236    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
237    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
238    * </ul>
239    *
240    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
241    *    <li class='note'>
242    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
243    * </ul>
244    *
245    * @return The annotation value.
246    */
247   String beansRequireSettersForGetters() default "";
248
249   /**
250    * Beans don't require at least one property.
251    *
252    * <p>
253    * If <js>"true"</js>, then a Java class doesn't need to contain at least 1 property to be considered a bean.
254    * <br>Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
255    *
256    * <ul class='values'>
257    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
258    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
259    * </ul>
260    *
261    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
262    *    <li class='note'>
263    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
264    * </ul>
265    *
266    * @return The annotation value.
267    */
268   String disableBeansRequireSomeProperties() default "";
269
270   /**
271    * Don't silently ignore missing setters.
272    *
273    * <p>
274    * If <js>"true"</js>, trying to set a value on a bean property without a setter will throw a {@code BeanRuntimeException}.
275    * <br>Otherwise it will be sliently ignored.
276    *
277    * <ul class='values'>
278    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
279    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
280    * </ul>
281    *
282    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
283    *    <li class='note'>
284    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
285    * </ul>
286    *
287    * @return The annotation value.
288    */
289   String disableIgnoreMissingSetters() default "";
290
291   /**
292    * Don't ignore transient fields.
293    *
294    * <p>
295    * If <jk>true</jk>, methods and fields marked as <jk>transient</jk> will not be ignored as bean properties.
296    *
297    * <ul class='values'>
298    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
299    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
300    * </ul>
301    *
302    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
303    *    <li class='note'>
304    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
305    * </ul>
306    *
307    * @return The annotation value.
308    */
309   String disableIgnoreTransientFields() default "";
310
311   /**
312    * Don't ignore unknown properties with null values.
313    *
314    * <p>
315    * If <js>"true"</js>, trying to set a <jk>null</jk> value on a non-existent bean property will throw a {@code BeanRuntimeException}.
316    * Otherwise it will be silently ignored.
317    *
318    * <ul class='values'>
319    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
320    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
321    * </ul>
322    *
323    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
324    *    <li class='note'>
325    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
326    * </ul>
327    *
328    * @return The annotation value.
329    */
330   String disableIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties() default "";
331
332   /**
333    * Don't use interface proxies.
334    *
335    * <p>
336    * Disables the feature where interfaces will be instantiated as proxy classes through the use of an
337    * {@link InvocationHandler} if there is no other way of instantiating them.
338    * <br>Setting this to <js>"true"</js> causes this to be a {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.BeanRuntimeException}.
339    *
340    * <ul class='values'>
341    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
342    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
343    * </ul>
344    *
345    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
346    *    <li class='note'>
347    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
348    * </ul>
349    *
350    * @return The annotation value.
351    */
352   String disableInterfaceProxies() default "";
353
354   /**
355    * Find fluent setters.
356    *
357    * <p>
358    * When enabled, fluent setters are detected on beans.
359    *
360    * <p>
361    * Fluent setters must have the following attributes:
362    * <ul>
363    *    <li>Public.
364    *    <li>Not static.
365    *    <li>Take in one parameter.
366    *    <li>Return the bean itself.
367    * </ul>
368    *
369    * <ul class='values'>
370    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
371    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
372    * </ul>
373    *
374    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
375    *    <li class='note'>
376    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
377    * </ul>
378    *
379    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
380    *    <li class='ja'>{@link BeanType#findFluentSetters()}
381    * </ul>
382    *
383    * @return The annotation value.
384    */
385   String findFluentSetters() default "";
386
387   /**
388    * Ignore invocation errors on getters.
389    *
390    * <p>
391    * If <js>"true"</js>, errors thrown when calling bean getter methods will silently be ignored.
392    * <br>Otherwise, a {@code BeanRuntimeException} is thrown.
393    *
394    * <ul class='values'>
395    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
396    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
397    * </ul>
398    *
399    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
400    *    <li class='note'>
401    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
402    * </ul>
403    *
404    * @return The annotation value.
405    */
406   String ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters() default "";
407
408   /**
409    * Ignore invocation errors on setters.
410    *
411    * <p>
412    * If <js>"true"</js>, errors thrown when calling bean setter methods will silently be ignored.
413    * <br>Otherwise, a {@code BeanRuntimeException} is thrown.
414    *
415    * <ul class='values'>
416    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
417    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
418    * </ul>
419    *
420    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
421    *    <li class='note'>
422    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
423    * </ul>
424    *
425    * @return The annotation value.
426    */
427   String ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters() default "";
428
429   /**
430    * Ignore unknown properties.
431    *
432    * <p>
433    * If <js>"true"</js>, trying to set a value on a non-existent bean property will silently be ignored.
434    * <br>Otherwise, a {@code RuntimeException} is thrown.
435    *
436    * <ul class='values'>
437    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
438    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
439    * </ul>
440    *
441    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
442    *    <li class='note'>
443    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
444    * </ul>
445    *
446    * @return The annotation value.
447    */
448   String ignoreUnknownBeanProperties() default "";
449
450   /**
451    * Schema validation mode.
452    *
453    * <p>
454    * If <js>"true"</js>, bean property values are validated against the constraints declared by
455    * {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.Schema @Schema} annotations on those properties.  Validation runs
456    * during both <b>parsing</b> (value set on the bean) and <b>serialization</b> (value read from the bean).
457    *
458    * <p>
459    * Backed by the typed {@code JsonSchema} bean in {@code juneau-bean-jsonschema} and JSON Schema Draft 2020-12
460    * semantics.  Validation failures throw
461    * {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.SchemaValidationException} wrapped in {@code BeanRuntimeException};
462    * the parser surfaces them as parse exceptions and the serializer surfaces them as serialize exceptions.
463    *
464    * <p>
465    * If {@code juneau-bean-jsonschema} is not on the classpath, this setting becomes a silent no-op.
466    *
467    * <ul class='values'>
468    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
469    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
470    * </ul>
471    *
472    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
473    *    <li class='note'>
474    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
475    * </ul>
476    *
477    * @return The annotation value.
478    * @since 10.0.0
479    */
480   String validateSchema() default "";
481
482   /**
483    * Ignore unknown enum values.
484    *
485    * <p>
486    * If <js>"true"</js>, unknown enum values are set to <jk>null</jk> instead of throwing an exception.
487    *
488    * <ul class='values'>
489    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
490    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
491    * </ul>
492    *
493    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
494    *    <li class='note'>
495    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
496    * </ul>
497    *
498    * @return The annotation value.
499    */
500   String ignoreUnknownEnumValues() default "";
501
502   /**
503    * Identifies a set of interfaces.
504    *
505    * <p>
506    * When specified, only the list of properties defined on the interface class will be used during serialization
507    * of implementation classes.  Additional properties on subclasses will be ignored.
508    *
509    * <p class='bjava'>
510    *    <jc>// Parent class or interface</jc>
511    *    <jk>public abstract class</jk> A {
512    *       <jk>public</jk> String <jf>foo</jf> = <js>"foo"</js>;
513    *    }
514    *
515    *    <jc>// Sub class</jc>
516    *    <jk>public class</jk> A1 <jk>extends</jk> A {
517    *       <jk>public</jk> String <jf>bar</jf> = <js>"bar"</js>;
518    *    }
519    *
520    *    <jc>// Apply it to a config</jc>
521    *    <ja>@BeanConfig</ja>(
522    *       interfaces={
523    *          A.<jk>class</jk>
524    *       }
525    *    )
526    * </p>
527    *
528    * <p>
529    * This annotation can be used on the parent class so that it filters to all child classes, or can be set
530    * individually on the child classes.
531    *
532    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
533    *    <li class='note'>The {@link BeanType#interfaceClass() @BeanType(interfaceClass)} annotation is the equivalent annotation-based solution.
534    * </ul>
535    *
536    * @return The annotation value.
537    */
538   Class<?>[] interfaces() default {};
539
540   /**
541    * Bean class exclusions.
542    *
543    * <p>
544    * List of classes that should not be treated as beans even if they appear to be bean-like.
545    * <br>Not-bean classes are converted to <c>Strings</c> during serialization.
546    *
547    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
548    *    <li class='note'>
549    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
550    * </ul>
551    *
552    * @return The annotation value.
553    */
554   Class<?>[] notBeanClasses() default {};
555
556   /**
557    * Replace classes that should not be considered beans.
558    *
559    * <p>
560    * Same as {@link #notBeanClasses()} but replaces any existing value.
561    *
562    * @return The annotation value.
563    */
564   Class<?>[] notBeanClasses_replace() default {};
565
566   /**
567    * Bean package exclusions.
568    *
569    * <p>
570    * When specified, the current list of ignore packages are appended to.
571    *
572    * <p>
573    * Any classes within these packages will be serialized to strings using {@link Object#toString()}.
574    *
575    * <p>
576    * Note that you can specify suffix patterns to include all subpackages.
577    *
578    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
579    *    <li class='note'>
580    *       The default value excludes the following packages:
581    *       <ul class='compact'>
582    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.lang</c>
583    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.lang.annotation</c>
584    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.lang.ref</c>
585    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.lang.reflect</c>
586    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.io</c>
587    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.net</c>
588    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.nio.*</c>
589    *          <li class='jp'><c>java.util.*</c>
590    *       </ul>
591    *    <li class='note'>
592    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
593    * </ul>
594    *
595    * @return The annotation value.
596    */
597   String[] notBeanPackages() default {};
598
599   /**
600    * Replace packages whose classes should not be considered beans.
601    *
602    * <p>
603    * Same as {@link #notBeanPackages()} but replaces any existing value.
604    *
605    * @return The annotation value.
606    */
607   String[] notBeanPackages_replace() default {};
608
609   /**
610    * Bean property namer.
611    *
612    * <p>
613    * The class to use for calculating bean property names.
614    *
615    * <p>
616    * Predefined classes:
617    * <ul>
618    *    <li>{@link BasicPropertyNamer} (default)
619    *    <li>{@link PropertyNamerDLC} - Dashed-lower-case names.
620    *    <li>{@link PropertyNamerULC} - Dashed-upper-case names.
621    * </ul>
622    *
623    * @return The annotation value.
624    */
625   Class<? extends PropertyNamer> propertyNamer() default PropertyNamer.Void.class;
626
627   /**
628    * Optional rank for this config.
629    *
630    * <p>
631    * Can be used to override default ordering and application of config annotations.
632    *
633    * @return The annotation value.
634    */
635   int rank() default 0;
636
637   /**
638    * Disable sorted bean properties.
639    *
640    * <p>
641    * When <jk>true</jk>, bean properties are serialized and accessed in natural JVM order instead of the default alphabetical order.
642    *
643    * <ul class='values'>
644    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
645    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default — properties are sorted alphabetically)
646    * </ul>
647    *
648    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
649    *    <li>
650    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
651    * </ul>
652    *
653    * @return The annotation value.
654    */
655   String unsortedProperties() default "";
656
657   /**
658    * Use Java Introspector.
659    *
660    * <p>
661    * Using the built-in Java bean introspector will not pick up fields or non-standard getters/setters.
662    * <br>Most {@link BeanType @BeanType} annotations will be ignored.
663    *
664    * <ul class='values'>
665    *    <li><js>"true"</js>
666    *    <li><js>"false"</js> (default)
667    * </ul>
668    *
669    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
670    *    <li class='note'>
671    *       Supports <a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/DefaultVarResolver">VarResolver.DEFAULT</a> (e.g. <js>"$C{myConfigVar}"</js>).
672    * </ul>
673    *
674    * @return The annotation value.
675    */
676   String useJavaBeanIntrospector() default "";
677}
